generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are actually benefiting more from our strategic autonomy than we are? While we're investing heavily in our defense capabilities, some countries are quietly relying on our efforts while doing the minimum themselves. It's time we prioritize our own security and ensure our investments are truly securing our future. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
